mapper.select:
SELECT id, se_fan_equip_code, se_fan_name, se_fan_type, se_fan_spec, se_fan_rated_power, se_fan_rated_speed, se_fan_rated_pressure, se_fan_rated_flow, se_fan_medium, se_fan_material, se_fan_explosion_proof, se_fan_motor_model, se_fan_install_pos, se_fan_in_service, se_fan_inspect_cycle, se_fan_last_inspect, se_fan_next_inspect, se_fan_inspect_result, se_fan_lubrication, se_fan_last_lubricate, se_fan_next_lubricate, se_fan_vibration, se_fan_maintain_record, se_fan_fault_record, se_fan_operator, se_fan_create_time, se_fan_update_time, se_fan_status, se_fan_factory, se_fan_reserve1, se_fan_reserve2, se_fan_reserve3 FROM se_fan
and se_fan_equip_code like CONCAT( #{queryParams.seFanEquipCode}, '%')
and se_fan_name = #{queryParams.seFanName}
and se_fan_status like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seFanStatus}, '%')
and se_fan_factory like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seFanFactory}, '%')

SELECT id, se_fan_equip_code, se_fan_name, se_fan_type, se_fan_spec, se_fan_rated_power, se_fan_rated_speed, se_fan_rated_pressure, se_fan_rated_flow, se_fan_medium, se_fan_material, se_fan_explosion_proof, se_fan_motor_model, se_fan_install_pos, se_fan_in_service, se_fan_inspect_cycle, se_fan_last_inspect, se_fan_next_inspect, se_fan_inspect_result, se_fan_lubrication, se_fan_last_lubricate, se_fan_next_lubricate, se_fan_vibration, se_fan_maintain_record, se_fan_fault_record, se_fan_operator, se_fan_create_time, se_fan_update_time, se_fan_status, se_fan_factory, se_fan_reserve1, se_fan_reserve2, se_fan_reserve3 FROM se_fan
and se_fan_equip_code like CONCAT( #{seFanEquipCode}, '%')
and se_fan_name = #{seFanName}
and se_fan_status like CONCAT ('%',#{seFanStatus}, '%')
and se_fan_factory like CONCAT ('%',#{seFanFactory}, '%')
